summary: Velion Login Bubble & Mobile Overlay Fix - Iteration 139. All features verified: 1) Login bubble appears after ~1.2s delay with correct Italian text, 2) Close (X) button works, 3) 'Inizia ora' CTA works and focuses email input, 4) localStorage persistence prevents re-showing bubble, 5) Mobile overlay z-index fix verified (bubble z-[52] > character z-50), 6) Mobile positioning verified (bubble bottom-[180px], character bottom-20) with 28px gap - no overlap.
critical_code_review_comments: VelionLoginBubble.jsx: Uses localStorage key 'velion_login_bubble_seen' for persistence
VelionLoginBubble.jsx: 1200ms delay before showing bubble (setTimeout in useEffect)
VelionLoginBubble.jsx: onStart callback focuses email input via document.querySelector
VelionOverlay.jsx Line 146: Bubble has z-[52] and bottom-[180px] on mobile, sm:bottom-[96px] on desktop
VelionOverlay.jsx Line 178: Character has z-50 and bottom-20 on mobile, sm:bottom-6 on desktop
AuthPage.jsx Line 99-102: VelionLoginBubble rendered with onStart callback
context_for_next_testing_agent: Velion Login Bubble and Mobile Overlay Fix fully verified. Key findings: 1) VelionLoginBubble uses localStorage key 'velion_login_bubble_seen' - clear it to test bubble again. 2) Bubble appears after 1.2s delay on AuthPage. 3) Italian text verified: 'Benvenuto in CineWorld Studio's', 'costruisci un impero', 'primo browser game sul cinema con PvP', 'Siamo ancora in sviluppo', 'Aiutaci a migliorare', 'Inizia ora'. 4) Close button (data-testid='velion-login-bubble-close') and CTA button (data-testid='velion-login-start-btn') both work. 5) Mobile viewport (390x844): bubble z-[52] at bottom-[180px], character z-50 at bottom-20 (80px), gap of 28px between them - no overlap.

phrases_found: primo browser game sul cinema con PvP

velion_login_bubble_cta_button.behavior: Hides bubble, sets localStorage, focuses email input

velion_login_bubble_localstorage_persist.behavior: Bubble not shown again after dismissal

velion_mobile_both_visible.result: Both bubble and character fully visible
